transcript.clean_text: Tom ban took Center Stage ahead of his last Parry Ru on Sunday with the four-time record winner in the 120 strong field about to take on the grueling 9 Cobble sections in the 250 km of a race that's not nicknamed the hell of the north for nothing after 100 km punctuated by a number of falls in the pelaton the first attempt at imposing a rhythm at the front of the field began with three men setting the pace the large of the fros de team and two Belgian Riders Vandenburg of ag2r and Wes of the lotto sudal team the trio broke away before the first Cobble section and helped the field cover 143 km in 3 hours putting them eles on course to record the fastest Perry rupe ever back in the pelaton Greg van aat was one of the first to be tripped up in the valz section of cobbles while up ahead Boran tried to accelerate put some distance between himself and his rival but aat managed to get himself back in touch with 84 km to go and a group of big hitters broke away including bonan and pet Sagan before the Cobble section at Monon pevel Daniel o and yasper Sten took up the pace but with genx stebar driving them on the league group and and that containing the favorites were United 40 km from the line with 15 km to go at the tree Crossroads the decisive move was made as three men managed to break clear among them two of the favorites van aat and shba with canondale rider Sebastian lelt in tow they had a comfortable lead coming into the vome in rub though Two Men moscon and Sten came back at them to make it a fiveman race stear started the Sprint but it was Van aat who finished it pipping his rival on the line the first win for himba second again in Ru boan on his swansong finished outside the top 10 Greg van aat is just unbeatable in 2017 and is cleaning up in the spring Classics having already won the Grand Prix E3 the gond vgam and the head nlad the Olympic champion added the Parry ruet to his list of honors after after finishing third two years ago The BMC Rider still has some major Ambitions in the coming days notably the tour of Flanders a race he finished runner up in in both 2014 and 2015 if he can fulfill his dream of winning the Rond he'll have already made this year an exceptional one it's maybe the race I would say was not able to win I when I first came here I was so tired at the finish line and it was need not really what I was expecting but uh yeah I'm so happy that I did it Greg van aat finally wins in Ru after coming close in recent years just like in 2015 stear finishes second Aro dear led the peleton home while Tom Ban's final Parry rube ends with him in 13th so the Flanders Classics end as always in rubay now it's the turn of the ardens classics with laf flesh valon coming up next for now though do what the Riders couldn't and enjoy the sun and the countryside that provided a wonderful stage for the hell of the North
